message:
feat(cli): replace string-based focus with typed FocusMode enum for agent diff

Introduces a FocusMode enum (All, New, Removed, Changed, Resources)
with a parse_focus_mode value_parser function that replaces the raw
string matching in run_agent_diff. Benefits:

- Invalid focus values are now rejected at argument parsing time with
  a clear error message listing valid options, instead of silently
  falling through to the catch-all match arm.
- The "improved" and "persistent" focus modes (which were undocumented
  and inconsistent with the --help text) are removed — "changed" now
  covers both worsened and improved, matching the documented behavior.
- All string comparisons and to_lowercase() calls in the diff logic
  are replaced with typed enum matching.

Adds test agent_diff_rejects_invalid_focus asserting that --focus
not-a-mode produces a failure with "Invalid focus mode" in stderr.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
